name: aivm-lm
description: Agent VM for Lost-Media Hunting — see VM_design.md

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/casefile/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/artifacts/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/acquisition/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/recon/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/swarm/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/identify/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/profiles/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/tor/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/agent/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/mcp/tsconfig.json
